card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, reveal the top card of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 3
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a token that's a copy of the exiled card.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 4
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, return the exiled card/s to the battlefield.

card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Yaromir TRO
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 6
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, return the exiled card to your hand.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 7
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 8
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, you mill four cards.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 9
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a 4/4 red Dragon creature token with flying.

card.name: Twiddlebox TRO
card.text: {U}, {T}: Tap or untap another target permanent. Activate only outside of combat.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 10
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a token that's a copy of target non-legendary artifact you control.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 11
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a Treasure token.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 12
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with “This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.”

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 13
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, draw two cards.

card.name: colorless Battle Hunt TRO 14
card.text: *(This token enters under an opponent's protection. You and others can attack it.)*\nWhen this battle is defeated, you may search your library for a card named Whisperfoot Skitterer, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. {4}, {T}: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: black Demon Inkling 44HEX
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature.

card.name: black Dog Inkling 31HEX
card.text: Menace

card.name: Draft Archetypes TGS
card.text: {W}{U} ROBOTS The way of all flesh is defeat. Beep Boop. {U}{B} MINDMELD Tap your creatures with the power of your mind hammer. {B}{R} MINDMELD Attack alone, heedless of the danger. {R}{G} REFINE Push forward aggressively through sacrifice. {G}{W} COUNTERS +1/+1 counters are vital throughout the galaxy. {W}{B} REFINE Play the long game, sacrifice early and win late. {B}{G} GRIND In space, the graveyard is only a temporary respite. {G}{U} SABOTEUR Combat damage triggers are great, and so is combat damage. {U}{R} INTERSTELLAR Cast spells from beyond the dark side of the moon. {R}{W} INTERSTELLAR Your warpjumping creatures are your path to success.

card.name: Dread Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Search your library for a Plains card and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Duty Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Target creature you control gains vigilance and first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Empower Function HQZ
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Energization Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* You get {E} equal to this spell's mana value.

card.name: Execution Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Exile target nonland permanent until target creature you control leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Flame Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Flash Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Flash

card.text: Return target non-Bard creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Healing Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* You gain 1 life for each enchantment you control.

card.name: Osiris, Scholar of the Cosmos DES
card.text: Prowess, ward {2} Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, if it isn't legendary, sacrifice it at end of combat. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may pay {1}{U}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of Osiris, except it isn't legendary. *(This token's mana cost is {2}{U}{U}.)*

card.name: Plans to Fruition IID
card.text: Draw three cards from the bottom of your library, then put two cards from your hand on the bottom.

card.name: Protector of the Lost IID
card.text: Vigilance\nWhen Protector of the Lost enters, it fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Raven AVA
card.text: Flying

card.name: Relinquish Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* You may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If you do, target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Replenish Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* You gain 1 life for each token you control.

card.name: Reset Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Sacrifice any number of tokens. When you do, discard your hand, then draw cards equal to the number of tokens sacrificed this way.

card.name: Risen Sage IID
card.text: Ward {2}\nIf you would draw a card, you may create a 2/2 Fractal creature token with decayed instead. *(It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)*

card.name: SIVA Swarm DES
card.text: Whenever SIVA Swarm is dealt damage, create a token that's a copy of SIVA Swarm. *(This token's mana cost is {4}.)*

card.text: {10}, {T}: This artifact deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. {T}: Tap target creature.

card.text: Trample

card.text: Defender

card.name: Stash WTS
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. A face-down card with stash can be cast from the battlefield for its stash cost.

card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add {C}. *(This token is affected by summoning sickness)*

card.name: Strip for Parts IID
card.text: Choose up to two target creatures. Exile one of those creatures and put two +1/+1 counters on the rest.

card.name: Sunset Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* This spell deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Sword of Victory HEX
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: The Core VRN
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures attacking a player that has The Core aren't blocked, their controller seizes The Core. *(This triggers after blockers are declared.)* At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have The Core, seize The Core. To seize The Core, choose one — • You get {E}. • Surveil 1.

card.name: The Core VRN 2
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures attacking a player that has The Core aren't blocked, their controller seizes The Core. *(This triggers after blockers are declared.)* At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have The Core, seize The Core. To seize The Core, choose one — • You get {E}. • Surveil 1.

card.name: colorless The Crowd's Favour KEC
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. Whenever a creature deals combat damage to you, its controller gains the Crowd's Favor

card.name: The Stage POP2
card.text: Onstage creatures are legendary, get +1/+1, and must be blocked before offstage creatures if able.

card.name: colorless Thopter 11VRN
card.text: Flying

card.name: Transformed Citizen IID
card.text: When Transformed Citizen enters, it deals 3 damage to each opponent and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Treasure VRN
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Trophy Reminder HEX
card.text: Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens. Chest of Desires Token Artifact — Trophy At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. {4}, {T}: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top. Sword of Victory Token Artifact — Trophy Creatures you control get +1/+1. {T}: Add {C}{C}. Sigil of Conquest Token Artifact — Trophy Whenever one or more creatures you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Uncover Truth IID
card.text: Draw three cards from the bottom of your library, then put two cards from your hand on the bottom.

card.name: white Vampire Soldier 31HWEL
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Vryn Draft Archetypes VRN
card.text: {W}{U} SEIZE THE CORE Seize Vryn itself. Gain a steady stream of energy. And play tempo cards to level the playing field. {B}{U} COVERT CONSORTIUM Hit your opponents with sneaky creatures to uncover your opponents doom. {B}{R} VEHICLE MAVERICKS Run over your opponent with Vehicles and use crewing creatures as cannon fodder. {R}{G} ENERGIZED KICKER Accumulate energy and spend it to kick your spells into overdrive. {G}{W} TEACH ABILITIES Modify your creatures with ability counters. Attack with big creatures. {W}{B} PHYREXIAN ENTER THE BATTLEFIELD Reanimate and flicker your creatures to bury your opponent under a pile of value. {U}{R} WIZARDS FROM EXILE Rebound is back. Combine it with impulse effects and other cast from exile synergies to show your spellcasting domination. {G}{B} LEAVE THE GRAVE Make your cards leave the graveyard and get reward for it. {R}{W} INSPIRED GEARS Attack your opponent with inspired creatures and double up on your value by cracking some gears. {U}{G} ENGROSS FLASH Cast versatile spells during your opponents turn and disrupt them with counter-magic and spells with flash.

card.name: white Wall Inkling 04HEX
card.text: Damage that would be dealt to Artists you control is dealt to this creature instead.

card.name: all colors Warrior 22HEX
card.text: This creature is all colors and a chosen creature type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Wave Function DCO
card.text: *(Sacrifice this as you cast an instant or sorcery spell to add the following effects to that spell.)* Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Weave Fates IID
card.text: Draw three cards from the bottom of your library, then put two cards from your hand on the bottom.
